title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to teach teachers and school-aged students the foundations of AI and machine learning using research-backed pedagogies. The program has reached educators in over 165 countries and provides curriculum materials covering responsible and ethical AI use.
